description: A celiac trip-planner's terminal companion: every Find Me Gluten Free city, cached locally with cross-city compare, change tracking, and review safety filters the consumer app doesn't have.

tools.name: chains_list
tools.description: List chain restaurants with gluten-free options. Returns array of html_link.

tools.name: cities_list
tools.description: List cities in a state or region (e.g., /us/va lists Virginia cities). Required: country, state. Returns array of html_link.

params.name: state
params.description: State or region code (va, ca, on, ...).

tools.name: cities_ranked
tools.description: Find Me Gluten Free's published ranking of the most gluten-free-friendly cities. Returns array of html_link.

tools.name: countries_list
tools.description: List every country with gluten-free coverage on Find Me Gluten Free. Returns array of html_link.

tools.name: places_filter
tools.description: List restaurants in a city filtered by cuisine or feature. The filter slug can be 'dedicated-facilities', 'gluten-free-menu', or any of 200+ cuisine slugs (burgers, pizza, bakeries, ...). Required: country, state, city, filter. Returns array of html_link.

params.name: filter
params.description: Filter slug: dedicated-facilities, gluten-free-menu, or a cuisine slug (burgers, pizza, bakeries, asian, breakfast, etc.).

tools.name: places_get
tools.description: Get a single restaurant page. Use 'places hydrate' for the parsed schema.org JSON-LD (rating, reviews, lat/lng) — this raw command returns the title/description/canonical metadata only. Required: slug, biz_id.

params.name: biz_id
params.description: Restaurant numeric ID from the URL (e.g., 6118524171452416).

tools.name: places_list
tools.description: List restaurants in a city (e.g., /us/va/richmond). Required: country, state, city. Returns array of html_link.

tools.name: states_list
tools.description: List states or regions in a country (e.g., /us, /gb, /fr). Required: country. Returns array of html_link.

params.name: country
params.description: Two-letter country code (us, gb, fr, ie, ca).
